initial_draft:

<my resources> ZUP: 100 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 60 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The other player is offering X for 30 ZUP. I have 100 ZUP and my maximum willingness to pay is 60 ZUP. Accepting this offer is a good deal as it leaves me with 70 ZUP. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> I accept your offer. It's a good deal for both of us. </message>

4. Consistency: OK. The reason, player answer, and message are all consistent with accepting the trade.
5. Rule compliance: OK. The response respects the proposal budget and turn constraints.
</critique>
